title: Triton Inference Server
learning_outcomes: Explain Triton concurrency and dynamic batching.

content_sections.title: Enterprise Serving with Triton
content_sections.content: Triton Inference Server optimizes GPU utilization by running multiple model instances in parallel. It implements a dynamic batch scheduler that queues incoming inference requests and groups them into batches dynamically, maximizing throughput while respecting SLA latency bounds.
